Atty. RYAN G. CANAVAN, Esq. of Wilson Getty LLP (Tel: 858-847-3237) and ELANA M. DENMARK, Esq. of Fudge Broadwater, P.A. for defendants Scott Street Senior Housing Complex, Inc., Ira Kurtz, and Adrienne Fair;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS IRA KURTZ AND SCOTT STREET SENIOR HOUSING COMPLEX, INC.'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear.

Matter discussed.

The Court rules as follows: Defendants' application to admit Elana M. Denmark as counsel pro hac vice is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2022 Continued To Nov-09-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. RYAN G. CANAVAN, Esq. of Wilson Getty LLP (Tel: 858-847-3237) for defendants Scott Street Senior Housing Complex, Inc. dba Rhoda Goldman Plaza, Ira Kurtz, and Adrienne Fair.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS IRA KURTZ, ADRIENNE FAIR, AND SCOTT STREET SENIOR HOUSING COMPLEX, INC. DBA RHODA GOLDMAN PLAZA'S MOTION TO ADMIT ATTORNEY ELANA M. DENMARK AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear.

The Court informs movants it is missing the required information about Ms. Denmark as to the how many times Ms. Denmark has been granted pro hac vice admission in the State of California, and that it must receive this information from Ms. Denmark herself.

The Court grants movants' request for a continuance of today's hearing, and continues the matter to November 9, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
